title: Fusidic acid
body_html:
Fusidic acid Key Points
  • Bacteriostatic
  • Narrow spectrum
  • Active against penicillin resistant staphylococcal infections.
  • Primarily for gram positive infections particularly staphylococcus infections. It also has activity against beta-hemolytic strep, Corynebacterium and many clostridium species.
  • Typically used topically. It can be given intravenously or orally
  • Hepatic function should be monitored in high doses
3
